name: testControlNameLengthRestrictions
description: Verify that the Control Name field requires between 4 and 100 characters
descriptionHtml: Verify that the Control Name field requires between 4 and 100 characters

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0907.130145.25.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Fill in fraud control name: aaa
Verify that the 'Control Name' field is has attribute aria-invalid set
Verify that the Setup button is disabled if 'Control name' contains 3 characters
Fill in fraud control name: aaaa
Verify that the Setup button is enabled if 'Control name' contains 4 characters
